apps.name: CARE Analytics
apps.description: Analytics dashboard plugin for CARE. Provides data visualization and reporting capabilities for healthcare facility operations and patient care metrics.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_analytics_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Cash Management
apps.description: Cash management plugin for CARE. Provides cash drawer session management, transaction tracking, and financial reconciliation for healthcare facility billing operations.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_cash_management_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Doctor Connect
apps.description: Doctor directory and connection plugin for CARE. Enables searching and connecting with healthcare providers across facilities and organizations.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_doctor_connect_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Hello
apps.description: Sample CARE plugin used to exercise the App Store discovery and setup flow.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from apps/care_hello_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Imports
apps.description: Bulk data import and export plugin for CARE. Helps hospital administrators set up facilities by importing users, departments, locations, medications, lab tests, and more from CSV files with validation and review workflows.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_imports_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Pretty Print
apps.description: ID card and label printing plugin for CARE. Supports browser printing and ZC300 ZPL printing for patient ID cards, wristbands, and other healthcare labels.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_pretty_print_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Scribe
apps.description: AI-powered medical scriber for clinical documentation. Uses LLM technology to assist healthcare providers with structured medical data entry and clinical notes.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_scribe_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE System Diagnostics
apps.description: A comprehensive diagnostics plugin for the CARE platform that helps healthcare facility administrators verify system functionality, test hardware, and troubleshoot issues.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_system_diagnostics_fe for development and manual testing.
